inputs.high_level_description: An amateur photograph from 1981, showing a MiG-27 in combat with a flying saucer; a cruise missile explosion is visible on the saucer, and the jet's power shield absorbing a laser beam, with a red star visible on the fighter's interior; the second missile flies into a flying saucer
inputs.background: A vast, stormy sky with a dark blue base, showing a MiG-27 and a flying saucer in mid-combat. The background includes visible smoke trails and distant stars. A cruise missile explosion emits a bright white flash and orange fire.
inputs.style.photo: amateur 1980s film stock, handheld, low-resolution, visible lens flare and film grain
inputs.aesthetics: surreal, high-contrast, grainy, vintage film texture, retro sci-fi aesthetic
inputs.lighting: harsh artificial lighting, dramatic shadows, uneven exposure
inputs.elements_data: [{"type":"obj","text":"","desc":"A MiG-27 fighter jet flying at a steep angle, with a red star on the cockpit panel.
